title: Kanban Plan — Consistency Remediation (CLI/Contracts/Markdown)
description: SSOT execution plan to align CineTaste v5 with strict contract-first API docs, local CLI microservices, markdown-centered pipeline, and 3-state kanban discipline.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Close consistency gaps across flow, protocol, contracts, manifests, wrappers, and docs

DONE.task: Normalize kanban policy to 3 states across active AURA/template/docs
DONE.notes: Remove BLOCKED from SSOT planning standard

DONE.task: Fix FLOW parser fragility so non-step code blocks do not break run
Add project-local executable wrappers for ct-* CLIs and use them in pipeline
DONE.notes: No global PATH requirement; local repo executables only

DONE.task: Implement t2me output mapping to send-confirmation contract with runtime validation
DONE.notes: Step 5 must materialize contract payload, not raw logs only

DONE.task: Align markdown template paths and references to .aura/templates
Synchronize MANIFEST CLI flags/exit semantics with actual tool behavior
DONE.notes: Document --verbose and invalid argument exit codes

DONE.task: Expand tests for pipeline parse/run and send-confirmation stage
Run full test suite and record final consistency status

acceptance_criteria: ./run --dry-run parses FLOW and executes stages in markdown order
ct-fetch/ct-analyze/ct-filter/ct-format are runnable from project folder as CLI commands
t2me stage emits send-confirmation JSON that validates against contract
Template/documentation references point to existing markdown template artifacts
MANIFEST CLI declarations match real tool behavior
Automated tests cover CLI tools + pipeline parsing/execution paths
